title: The Alpha Who Said No
description: On her eighteenth birthday, Della finds her fated mate — and he is the alpha of the Ashfall pack, and he rejects her in front of the whole moon-gathering before she can say a single word. Two years later she walks back into Ashfall territory as the strongest tracker the rival packs have ever trained. She is not the girl he turned away. And the bond he severed never quite died.

chapters.title: The Long Way Down the Mountain
